medieval_fantasy.name: Medieval Fantasy
medieval_fantasy.description: A classic sword-and-sorcery world of castles, dungeons, dragons, and ancient magic. Kingdoms vie for power, adventurers delve into forgotten ruins, and the line between hero and villain is drawn in blood.

sci_fi.name: Sci-Fi Frontier
sci_fi.description: The year is 2847. Humanity has spread across the stars, but the frontier is lawless. Colony ships disappear, alien ruins hold deadly secrets, and mega-corporations wage shadow wars. You're a freelancer on the edge of known space.

modern.name: Modern Day Mystery
modern.description: The world looks normal on the surface. But beneath the fluorescent lights and social media feeds, something is deeply wrong. Strange things happen at 3 AM. The shadows move wrong. You've started to notice — and now they've noticed you noticing.

post_apocalyptic.name: Post-Apocalyptic Wasteland
post_apocalyptic.description: The Old World ended seventy years ago in fire and fallout. Now the survivors scrape by in the ruins. Clean water is gold, bullets are currency, and hope is the rarest resource of all. But rumors of a 'Green Zone' — a place where things still grow — drive people to wander.

anime_shonen.name: Anime Shonen World
anime_shonen.description: A vibrant world where martial arts, elemental powers, and the power of friendship collide. Schools of warriors train to become the strongest. Dark lords threaten the realm. And every battle is more dramatic than the last. BELIEVE IT!

slice_of_life.name: Cozy Slice of Life
slice_of_life.description: No world-ending threats here. Just a small town, a cozy shop, and the everyday magic of human connection. Run your bakery, help your neighbors, fall in love, and discover that the quiet life has its own kind of adventure.

horror.name: Cosmic Horror
horror.description: The universe is vast, ancient, and utterly indifferent to humanity. You've glimpsed something beyond the veil — a truth that shatters sanity. Now the whispers follow you everywhere, the shadows have geometry that shouldn't exist, and sleep brings no peace. You must find the source before it finds you.
